cms-84: Who can become a Rain Networks reseller?
cms-85: We partner with MSPs, technical consulting firms, computer repair shops, OEM hardware providers, and retail computer stores across the United States and Canada.
cms-86: What does value-added distribution actually mean?
cms-87: Beyond fulfilling orders, we add pre-sales consulting, technical training, deal registration, marketing resources, and post-sales support so you can sell and deploy with confidence.
cms-88: Which security categories do you cover?
cms-89: Endpoint security, email security, backup and recovery, security awareness training, and RMM with IT management, spanning 15 carefully selected vendors.
cms-91: Pricing is based on your requirements and volume. Tell us what you need and we will put together competitive partner pricing for your deals.
cms-92: Is there a cost to become a partner?
cms-93: No. Becoming a Rain Networks reseller is free. You get pricing and enablement based on your business needs, and we respond to new inquiries within one business day.
